name: writeEx
title: writeEx
syntax: void writeEx(long sink, dword severity, char format[], ...)
description: Writes the text into the last line of the specified CANoe window, into a page of the Write Window or into a logging file without previously creating a new line.
To write into the CANoe Trace Window please activate the CAPL System Message in the predefined filters of the Trace Window.

parameters.description: Output to the logging file (only in ASC format and if the CAPL node is inserted in the Measurement Setup in front of the Logging Block)
Output to the System page of the Write Window
Output to the CAPL page of the Write Window
Output to the Test page of the Write Window
